options.name: --branch
options.description:
Source branch name (overrides
SYSTEM_PULLREQUEST_SOURCEBRANCH environment variable)

options.name: --format
options.description:
Run dotnet format on the repository and commit any changes
back to the PR

options.name: --keep-repo
options.description:
Keep the cloned repository directory (pr-src) after
validation for debugging purposes

options.name: --pat
options.description:
Personal Access Token for Azure DevOps (overrides AZDO_PAT
environment variable)

options.name: --pr
options.description:
Pull request ID (overrides SYSTEM_PULLREQUEST_PULLREQUESTID
environment variable)
